span.p:
User Query
'What is the warranty on
UltraWasher 8262?'

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
ReACT History
(empty on iteration 1,
grows each iteration)

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Base Persona
'You are Piper, an AI customer
support agent...
You must reason step-by-step
using the ReACT framework.'

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Reflexion Context
(from past poor interactions)
'Learnings from past interactions:
- When comparing warranties,
always check both products'

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Plan Context
(from Stage 4 planning)
'Execution plan:
1. Look up warranty (warranty_check)
2. Look up price (price_lookup)'

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Tool Descriptions
'product_search(query, top_k)
price_lookup(product_name)
warranty_check(product_name)
product_compare(product_names)'

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Output Rules
'Pattern 1: Thought + Action
Pattern 2: Thought + Answer'
